    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    clsActor
    Represents an actor in the system, extending the base person information with actor-specific details and functionality.
    clsCast
    Represents a cast member in a movie, linking an actor to a specific role in a film.
    clsFavouriteActor
    Represents a user's favorite actor relationship in the system.
    clsFavouriteMovie
    Represents a user's favorite movie relationship in the system.
    clsGenre
    Represents a movie genre in the system.
    clsMovie
    Represents a movie in the system.
    clsPerson
    Represents a person in the system with basic personal information.
    clsUser
    Represents a user in the system, extending the base person information with user-specific details and contact information.
    GeneralMethods
    Provides general utility methods for common database operations across different entity types.
    Main
